title: rinorea angustifolia subsp. ardisiiflora
intro: Rinorea angustifolia subsp. ardisiiflora, also known as the 'Ardisiiflora', is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine and is known to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rinorea angustiflora subsp. ardisiiflora include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Rinorea angustifolia subsp. ardisiiflora typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and roots, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to treat skin conditions.
